name: accounting firms managing 10-20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients, inefficient tracking of fixed assets causes delayed tax filings. We provide a fixed asset registry that depreciates equipment and generates tax forms instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking and reporting of fixed assets for multiple clients.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tracking and reporting of fixed assets for multiple clients.
